title: xantophtalmum coronarium var. discolor
intro: Xantophtalmum coronarium var. discolor, also known as the yellow trumpet or yellow crown flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and protecting against infections. Xantophtalmum coronarium var. discolor can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
